Note：power limit value please check with project team RD.
23. Peripheral IC Communication Requirements
Refer to the “ASUS_Gaming_EC&Peripheral_IC_Communication_Requirements” spec.
[PAGE 44]
Gaming EC Common Requirements
ASUSTeK Confidential 37
24. EC and RTC Reset Behavior
2024 起的專案 Reset IC 移除，改用 EC FW(Power Button Watchdog Timer )去 count。
2024 起的專案在 EC Reset 與 RTC Reset 完成後，Power LED 將會亮滅行為讓 User 可辨
識，並且必須符合 LID CLOSE 時，按壓 Power Switch 無法 Reset EC 與 RTC，避免機構因素
與異物造成重置的防範行為。
依照硬體線路差異可分成以下兩種架構會有不同的行為
1. EC 不包括 Reset IC function

summary: 本章規範了不同晶片和固件版本的識別方法。
key_points: 根據廠商規定，使用 Null-terminated 字串表示 FW 版本
使用 EC Information table 的 Command 0xBB 讀取 Chip ID 和 FW 版本長度
evidence: According to each vendor EC version string naming rule, use Null-terminated string.
-Output 0x25D 0xBB (EC Information table – Command 0xBB)

Example
a. Get length of FW revision
-Output 0x25D 0xBB (EC Information table – Command 0xBB)
-Output 0x25C 0x00 (index = 00h)
-Input 0x25C (Return Data = Length of FW revision)
b. Get Chip ID
-Output 0x25D 0xBB (EC Information table – Command 0xBB)
-Output 0x25C 0x10 (index = 10)
-Input 0x25C (Return Data = Chip ID)
c. FW Revision strings
According to each vendor EC version string naming rule, use Null-terminated string.
Ex: EC Version is 1.24, Project name is MJ401TA

summary: 本章規範了與電池和充電器狀態相關的命令及表格內容。
key_points: 電源來源由位元組0描述，包括AC電源狀態
EC電池狀態由位元組1描述，包含錯誤、充滿電等狀態標記
充電器狀態由位元組2描述，包括快速充電和預充電模式
evidence: Bit0 – AC status, 0 = No AC power supply, 1 = AC power supply
Bit7 – Battery error, Bit4 – Battery full charged
Bit3 – Stop-charge, Bit2 – Fast-charge

summary: 本章規範了PF警報、EC的處理流程以及健康資訊表的讀取命令。
key_points: PF警報由SMBus命令0x99的bit7觸發
EC收到請求後清除標誌並通知BIOS和MyASUS
當數據準備好時設置標誌，當被請求時清除標誌
evidence: PF Alarm – SMBus Commands of Smart battery 0x99(ASUS Battery Status) bit7(PF)
EC triggers BIOS to notify (0x98 Event) MyASUS when PF/pre-charge timeout/Abnormal
Set the flag when the data is ready, clear the flag when requested
content:
Remark 2： PF Alarm – SMBus Commands of Smart battery 0x99(ASUS Battery Status) bit7(PF)
Remark 3： EC triggers BIOS to notify (0x98 Event) MyASUS when PF/pre-charge timeout/Abnormal
pre-charge timeout was happened.
Remark 4： EC receives this request and clears the flag.
Remark 5： Set the flag when the data is ready, clear the flag when requested.
Remark 6： PF、Manufacture information and lifetime. All data has been ready in 1.5S after this
flag was set.
Remark 7： The data has been ready in 150ms after this flag was set.
[PAGE 19]
ASUSTeK Confidential 12

-Output 0x25C 0x01 (Table index = 01h)
-Output 0x25C 0x00 (Offset = 00h)
-Output 0x25C 0x00 (Data = 00h)
-Input 0x25C (Return Data = Power Source Status)

-Output 0x25C 0x41 (Offset = 41h)
-Output 0x25C 0x00 (Data = 00h)
-Input 0x25C (Return Data = High Byte of Remaining Capacity)
c. Get PF data
1. Set PF data request

summary: 本章規範了如何透過特定命令和偏移值獲取健康資訊表中的PF數據。
key_points: 輸出特定的命令來讀取健康信息
延遲後檢查數據是否準備好
讀取PF數據
evidence: Output 0x25D 0xDD
Delay 150ms
Input 0x25C (Check PF data ready flag)
content:
-Output 0x25D 0xDD (Healthy Information table Command 0xDD)
-Output 0x25C 0x81 (Table index = 81h)
-Output 0x25C 0x5A (Offset = 5Ah)
-Output 0x25C 0x20 (Data = 20h)
2. Delay 150ms
3. Check data ready
-Output 0x25D 0xDD (Healthy Information table Command 0xDD)
-Output 0x25C 0x01 (Table index = 01h)
-Output 0x25C 0x5B (Offset = 5Bh)
-Output 0x25C 0x00 (Data = 00h)
-Input 0x25C (Check PF data ready flag)
4. Read PF data
-Output 0x25D 0xDD (Healthy Information table Command 0xDD)
-Output 0x25C 0x01 (Table index = 01h)
-Output 0x25C XX (Offset = 0x5C – 0x5F)
[PAGE 20]
ASUSTeK Confidential 13
-Output 0x25C 0x00 (Data = 00h)
-Input 0x25C (PF data)
d. Get all data (PF、Manufacture information & lifetime)
1. Set all data request
-Output 0x25D 0xDD (Healthy Information table Command 0xDD)
-Output 0x25C 0x81 (Table index = 81h)
-Output 0x25C 0x5A (Offset = 5Ah)
-Output 0x25C 0x80 (Data = 80h)
2. Delay 1.5S
3. Check data ready
-Output 0x25D 0xDD (Healthy Information table Command 0xDD)
-Output 0x25C 0x01 (Table index = 01h)
-Output 0x25C 0x5B (Offset = 5Bh)
-Output 0x25C 0x00 (Data = 00h)
-Input 0x25C (Check data ready flag)
4. Read data

summary: 本章規範 Thermal Information table 的結構和功能，包括各個溫度感測器的狀態和支持情況。
key_points: 表中存儲最近目標溫度
CPU、GPU 和其他溫度感測器的支持狀態由位元描述
溫度感測器的禁用狀態也由位元描述
evidence: This table stores the nearest target temperature and returns 0x00 if the sensor is not present.
Bit5 – AMD STT Temperature(Index 0x05)
Bit6 – Board sensor disable status, 0: None, 1: Disable
content:
ASUSTeK Confidential 14
2.2.2. Thermal Information table (Read 02h/Write 82h)
This table stores the nearest target temperature and returns 0x00 if the sensor is not present.
Offset Size Attribute Description
00h 1 R CPU temperature(℃) (Intenal temperature)
01h 1 R CPU temperature(℃)
02h 1 R Intel PCH temperature (℃)
03h 1 R GPU temperature(℃)
04h 1 R GPU temperature(℃)
05h 1 R AMD STT temperature(℃)
06h 1 R
Thermal sensors supported status
Bit5 – AMD STT Temperature(Index 0x05)
Bit4 – GPU Temperature(Index 0x04)
Bit3 – GPU Temperature(Index 0x03)
Bit2 – Intel PCH Temperature(Index 0x02)
Bit1 – CPU Temperature(Index 0x01)
Bit0 – CPU Temperature(Index 0x00)
0: Not Supported
1: Supported
07h 1 R
Thermal sensors disable status
Bit5 – AMD STT Temperature(Index 0x05)
Bit4 – GPU Temperature(Index 0x04)
Bit3 – GPU Temperature(Index 0x03)
Bit2 – Intel PCH Temperature(Index 0x02)
Bit1 – CPU Temperature(Index 0x01)
Bit0 – CPU Temperature(Index 0x00)
0: None (or the themal sensor not supported)
1: Thermal sensor disable (Unable to access due to power off/hibernate)
08h 1 R
Board temperature sensors status
According to “Board temperature sensor index”(11h)
Bit7 – Board sensor supported status, 0: Not Supported, 1: Supported
Bit6 – Board sensor disable status, 0: None, 1: Disable
09h 1 R
VR temperature sensors status

key_points: 需要將風扇測試模式設置為0x02
CPU TDP值由Intel CPU提供，AMD CPU返回0x00
記錄熱感應器錯誤狀態於寄存器39h中
風扇選擇和階段選擇在寄存器3Ah中進行
最大風扇階段數可從寄存器3Bh讀取

Intel CPU only, AMD CPU return 0x00.

summary: 本章規範了 GPU 和電源限制狀態的報告和清除，以及安全模式設置。
key_points: GPU限值計數在斷電時重置。
Power Limit Information Status 報告由 EC 設定的 Power Limit 值。
寫入 index 0x27 清除 Access Error 和其他錯誤狀態位。
Host Commands Security Mode 需要正確的安全密鑰才能設置模式。
evidence: Reset the count when powered off.
This command reports the Power Limit values set by the EC, including PECI/eSPI OOB/I2C, etc.
Bit3 – Access Error
Enter the correct security key (offset 29h: 53h, offset 2Ah: 4Dh) within 1s to set security mode
content:
Please refer to index 0x23 for the status code. The status is cleared when the GPU limit
pin is released.
25h RW
GPU Limit Count
Reset the count when powered off.
Increase the count when event 0x10 – 0x7F occurs. (index 0x23)
26h R
Power Limit Information Status
This command reports the Power Limit values set by the EC, including PECI/eSPI
OOB/I2C, etc. The commands include index 0x26-0x28.
The following bits (bit3 to bit0) are cleared when writing data to index 0x27.
Bit7 – Supported function, 0 = Not Supported, 1 = Supported
Bit6 – Supported Intel Power Limit 1/2/4
Bit5 – Supported AMD SPL/sPPT/fPPT/P3T
Bit4 – Reserved
Bit3 – Access Error
Bit2 – Parameter Fail
Bit1 – Access Processing
Bit0 – Access Done

mode, otherwise offset 29h-2Bh will be cleared.

summary: 本章規範了EC RAM存取的步驟和條件，包括錯誤狀態、地址範圍和長度限制。
key_points: Bit6 表示存取EC RAM失敗
位元5表示開始地址超出範圍
Bit4 表示存取長度超出範圍
存取請求由EC清除，回應時間須在25ms內
0Bh-0Eh 和 0Fh 定義了存取的開始地址和長度
evidence: Bit6 – Access to EC ram block Fail (Read only, cleared by write request)
Starting address out of range (Read only, cleared by write request)
Access length out of range (Read only, cleared by write request)
The reply must be success or failed within 25ms of receiving the request command.
0Bh-0Eh RW EC ram block access starting address
content:
Bit6 – Access to EC ram block Fail (Read only, cleared by write request)
Bit5 – Starting address out of range (Read only, cleared by write request)
Bit4 – Access length out of range (Read only, cleared by write request)
Bit0 – Access to EC ram block request (Cleared by the EC after receiving the request.)
The reply must be success or failed within 25ms of receiving the request command.
0Bh-0Eh RW EC ram block access starting address
0Fh RW Access length (Unit: Byte, Max 128)
10h-8Fh R EC ram block data (Cleared by write request)
I/O Port Access
Write data –
Out Cmd Port：FAh
Out Data Port：Data 1 (offset)
Out Data Port：Data 2 (value)
Read data –
Out Cmd Port：F9h
Out Data Port：Data 1 (offset)
Input Data Port：Data (value)
[PAGE 67]
ASUSTeK Confidential 60
Dump EC Ram Steps
1. Confirm the Total Number of EC RAM Blocks - Read offset 0x00
2. Write the Specified Block Index - Write to offset 0x01
3. Confirm Accessible Locations for the Block - Read offsets 0x02-0x09
4. Write Access EC RAM Start Position - Write to offsets 0x0B-0x0E
5. Write Access EC RAM Read Length - Write to offset 0x0F (Max 128 Bytes)
6. Request Access to EC RAM - Write 0x01 to offset 0x0A
7. Confirm Access Completion - Read offset 0x0A (Bit 7 = 1)
8. Read the Accessed EC RAM Data - Read offsets 0x10-0x8F

summary: 本章規範了電池管理系統在不同模式下的行為和設定，特別是充電和回充的策略。
key_points: 電池值通過讀取特定寄存器獲取
AC 充電時的充電行為
啟動電池保養模式後的初始recharge RSOC為78%
在電池保養模式下，持續插著 AC 電源會調整回充策略
可以通過拔插AC來立即滿足80%電量需求
evidence: Current = read 0x0A (the gauge of battery value)
若持續接上AC adaptor，將智能調整電池回充時機點以達到保護電池的目的
初始recharge RSOC為78%
可以將AC adaptor 重新拔插來滿足需求
content:
Q&A•Current = read 0x0A (the gauge of battery value) ，<-50mA (example: -51mA<-50mA; -49mA>-50mA)•AC in = plug in behavior of the PD or AC adaptor。•電池保養模式啟動後，初始recharge RSOC為78%，(example:當RSOC 79%啟動時recharge RSOC 為78% 但第㇐次達到Full charge 80%條件後，recharge RSOC 依然還是78%) 。•電池保養模式啟動後，若持續接上AC adaptor，將智能調整電池回充時機點以達到保護電池的目的，如需要立即回充至80%電量，可以將AC adaptor 重新拔插來滿足需求。•Battery care mode APP 2.0 ~ 4.0 history 。BCM2.0 BCM3.0 BCM4.0+Implemented date 2018 2022 2025Function items60%最佳保養模式80%平衡模式100%⾧效使用模式㇐鍵啟動80%㇐鍵回充100%4階段的回充點by 0.2C 充電電流
[PAGE 7]
CONFIDENTIAL AND PROPRIETARY INFORMATION
Thank you
